# FIXTURE: LEGO payment declined (real email, captured 2026-07-05)
# sender: Noreply@t.crm.lego.com
# subject: Your payment was unsuccessful
# gmail_message_id: 19f197de0b77f865  date: 2026-06-30T17:05:03Z
# note: click-tracking URLs stripped. NEW email type — not previously documented in lego.md.
# Order is held 5 business days, then presumably auto-cancelled. Order number + order date in body.

Dear Joshua,

Your payment for order T507979974, placed on 6/22/2026, has been declined.

We've got your order set aside for the next 5 business days. Please give us a call as soon as you can, and one of our LEGO experts will be ready to help you update your payment method.

You can find our contact number at the bottom of the page on
https://www.lego.com/service/contact-us
LEGO.com/service/contact-us.

Speak to you soon,
LEGO® Customer Service
